tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive exited 0; PR #19 BL-016 path drove the entire flow.

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh from project dir reports [OK] Context7 MCP installed and configured.

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exits 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo.' (PR #18 U-N/U-O fix confirmed).

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All five PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) accepted in order; final state reports 5/5 complete.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After all phase1 steps + gate-consistent run, .current_phase remains 0. No script auto-advances current_phase. This is the still-open U-D bug from prior sweep — recorded as a U-D confirmation, not a new bug.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after phase1 steps + gate pass
framework_bugs.reproduction: init.sh --non-interactive ... ; process-checklist.sh --start-phase1 ; complete all five phase1_architecture steps ; bash scripts/check-phase-gate.sh ; jq .current_phase .claude/phase-state.json -> 0
framework_bugs.expected: After all PHASE1_STEPS complete and the gate is consistent, .current_phase should advance to 1.
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase is still 0. Phase advancement remains a manual / undocumented step. Confirms still-open U-D from 2026-04-25 sweep.

documentation_gaps.gap: process-checklist.sh --help does not list --start-phase1 even though the action is implemented (case '--start-phase1' at line 45). Inconsistent help text.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: tests_written -> tests_verified_failing -> implemented -> security_audit (with stub findings file) -> documentation_updated -> feature_recorded all completed sequentially.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit succeeded after the 5 build-loop steps; only an advisory test-first WARN was emitted.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m "feat(bl006-trigger): no loop"` succeeded (exit 0). U-C is still open: direct git commits bypass PreToolUse and BL-006 cannot enforce subject prefix outside the hook path.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After --record-feature uat-feat-1, process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message 'feat(uat-3): grace test' returned 0 — grace window confirmed (PR #17 BL-006 fix holds).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json present, pre-commit-gate.sh (invoked with PreToolUse-shaped JSON payload) emitted permissionDecision=deny with the sentinel reason. PR #16 + PR #17 hook payload fix confirmed working.

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel and a subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation produced no deny output.

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: BL-006 not enforced by git commit-msg hook; direct shell commits bypass
framework_bugs.reproduction: In a fresh init'd project, with no active build_loop, run: git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'
framework_bugs.expected: Either a git commit-msg hook or some other always-on path should reject feat: subjects when no Build Loop is recorded.
framework_bugs.actual: Commit succeeded (exit 0). BL-006 only enforces through the Claude Code PreToolUse channel via process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message, which a direct shell invocation bypasses. Still-open U-C from prior sweep.

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 exited 0 with attestation warning (1 feature since last UAT).

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: lint-uat-scenarios.sh requires a populated HTML file. Run against tests/uat/templates/test-session-template.html (the seed template), 21 placeholder violations are reported by design (template has __SCENARIOS_JSON__ etc.). The linter rightly flags an unpopulated template; this is expected behavior. Marking N/A — a populated scenario was not produced by this UAT path.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All 9 PHASE3_STEPS completed; check-phase-gate.sh reports 'Phase gates consistent.'

documentation_gaps.gap: Runbook test 'uat_template_lints_clean' assumes a populated scenario file exists. lint-uat-scenarios.sh only accepts a populated HTML and rightly fails on the seed template; the runbook should clarify which file to lint or how to populate it for the UAT smoke check.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: Expected behavior: project is in sponsored_poc mode, so --start-phase4 emits '[FAIL] Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in sponsored poc mode.' and exits 0 (advisory). Phase 4 cannot proceed without an upgrade-project.sh --to-production. Subsequent phase4 assertions (each_phase4_step_completes, handoff_md_required, release_notes_required, phase4_completion_state) are intentionally not exercised for sponsored_poc base configs and are marked N/A.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A — sponsored_poc blocks Phase 4 entry; per init.sh next-steps output, an upgrade is required first.

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 not entered for sponsored_poc.

tests.name: release_notes_required
tests.details: N/A — Phase 4 not entered for sponsored_poc.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: N/A — sponsored_poc terminates at Phase 3 by design.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git grep on password/api_key/secret/token quoted-value patterns returned 0 actual secret hits; matches in framework template/doc files (CI workflows, governance docs) are documentation/placeholder references.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run; .claude/process-audit.log not created (correct per runbook spec).

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup capture). git status --short only shows pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ from before this agent ran. Framework-self guard from PR #18 held.

summary: Base sponsored_poc/mobile/light: init.sh --non-interactive (BL-016/PR #19) drove the full Phase 0-3 protocol cleanly; all PR #16-#19 fixes (U-E, U-F, U-H, U-N, U-O, BL-006 grace, BL-015 sentinel, hook payload path, fake-remote tolerance, framework self-guard) confirmed holding; reconfirmed still-open U-C (direct git commits bypass BL-006) and U-D (no script advances .current_phase) at Medium severity per runbook; Phase 4 correctly blocked for sponsored_poc.
